parameters.name: prompt
parameters.value: Review and enhance the following AI-generated content for quality, accuracy, and completeness. Original task: {{$node["AI Model Router"].json["task"]}}. Content: {{$json["response"]}}

parameters.subject: 🤖 AI Processing Complete: {{$json["task"]}}
parameters.html:
🤖 AI प्रोसेसिंग पूर्ण! AI Processing Complete!

📋 Task Details

Task Type: {{$json["task"]}}

Model Used: {{$json["modelUsed"]}} ({{$json["modelType"]}})

Language: {{$json["language"]}}

Processing Time: {{$json["processingTime"]}}

📊 Performance Metrics

Original Words: {{$json["metrics"]["originalWords"]}}

Generated Words: {{$json["metrics"]["generatedWords"]}}

Expansion Ratio: {{$json["metrics"]["expansionRatio"]}}x

Quality Score: {{$json["metrics"]["qualityScore"]}}%

📝 Primary AI Result

{{$json["primaryResult"]}}

✨ Quality Enhanced Result

{{$json["enhancedResult"]}}

🔧 System Status

  • 🟢 Gemma 3B Model: Active
  • 🟢 SHAKTI Model: Active
  • 🟢 Local Processing: Online
  • 🟢 Quality Enhancement: Enabled
  • 🟢 Offline Capability: ✅

AI processing completed successfully! 🎉

parameters.subject: ❌ AI Processing Failed
parameters.html:
❌ AI Processing Failed

Task: {{$node["AI Model Router"].json["task"]}}

Model: {{$node["AI Model Router"].json["model"]}}

Error Time: {{new Date().toLocaleString('hi-IN')}}

🔧 Troubleshooting Steps

  1. Check Ollama service status
  2. Verify model availability
  3. Restart AI services
  4. Check system resources

Please try again or check the system logs.

parameters.name: prompt
parameters.value: Perform a health check. Respond with 'GEMMA_HEALTHY' if you are functioning properly.

parameters.name: prompt
parameters.value: स्वास्थ्य जांच करें। यदि आप ठीक से काम कर रहे हैं तो 'SHAKTI_HEALTHY' के साथ उत्तर दें।

parameters.subject: 🏥 AI Models Health Report - {{new Date().toLocaleDateString('hi-IN')}}
parameters.html:
🏥 AI मॉडल स्वास्थ्य रिपोर्ट

📊 System Overview

Overall Status: {{$json["healthCheck"]["overallStatus"]}}

Total Models: {{$json["healthCheck"]["totalModels"]}}

System Uptime: {{$json["healthCheck"]["uptime"]}}

Avg Response Time: {{$json["healthCheck"]["averageResponseTime"]}}

Gemma 3B

{{$json["healthCheck"]["gemma3b"]}}

General purpose, English

SHAKTI

Hindi specialized, creative

📋 Recommendations

  • {{this}}
    • {{/each}}

⚡ Quick Actions

📤 Send POST to AI webhook: http://localhost:5678/webhook/ai-process-trigger

📋 Example payload: {"task": "translate", "content": "Hello", "language": "hindi"}

All systems ready for AI processing! 🚀

parameters.command: docker exec ollama-ai ollama run gemma:3b "optimize performance"

parameters.subject: ⚡ AI Models Optimized - {{new Date().toLocaleDateString('hi-IN')}}
parameters.html:
⚡ मॉडल ऑप्टिमाइजेशन पूर्ण!

Time: {{new Date().toLocaleTimeString('hi-IN')}}
